description: EnvZ-OmpR two-component system from RegulonDB (v13): EnvZ, OmpR, porin targets (ompF, ompC), and micF antisense RNA. OmpR represses micF; micF represses ompF translation.
name: EnvZ-OmpR (RegulonDB-sourced)
notes: V3 = RegulonDB only. OmpR activates ompF/ompC; OmpR represses micF; EnvZ phosphorylates OmpR. micF antisense represses ompF.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ENVZ[EnvZ]
    OMPR[OmpR]
    OMPF[ompF]
    OMPC[ompC]
    MICF[micF]
    ENVZ -->|phosphorylates| OMPR
    OMPR -->|activates| OMPF
    OMPR -->|activates| OMPC
    OMPR -->|represses| MICF
    MICF -->|antisense represses| OMPF
    style ENVZ fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPR fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style OMPC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style MICF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: From RegulonDB (v13) EnvZ-OmpR regulator–gene edges; OmpR targets ompF, ompC, micF.

sources.title: RegulonDB
sources.note: E. coli two-component systems, OmpR targets including micF.
